title: Remember Our Summer

lyrics.text: Lately I wanna stay awake
lyrics.translation: 最近我想保持清醒

lyrics.text: I don’t want the days to end
lyrics.translation: 我舍不得这些美好的日子就这样结束

lyrics.text: I know you’ll fly away
lyrics.translation: 我明白你终究会离我远去

lyrics.text: Need to hold you for myself
lyrics.translation: 我多想紧紧抱住你留住你的一丝气息

lyrics.text: I feel the time run through my hands
lyrics.translation: 我能感受得到时光如沙，在我掌心里慢慢流逝

lyrics.text: Try to grab it but it fades
lyrics.translation: 我疯狂地想紧紧抓住，但它只是流逝得更快

lyrics.text: Say "goodbye" in all the possible ways
lyrics.translation: 用任何可能的方式说再见

lyrics.text: I don’t want you to get lost
lyrics.translation: 我不想把你弄丢

lyrics.text: Will we ever meet again?
lyrics.translation: 我们还会再见面吗？

lyrics.text: I’ll anesthetize the pain
lyrics.translation: 我会麻醉疼痛自己疗伤

lyrics.text: Please remember our summers
lyrics.translation: 请你记住我们一起度过的那些夏天

lyrics.text: My heart is closed by duel
lyrics.translation: 我的心门被紧紧关闭了

lyrics.text: Will I learn to love again?
lyrics.translation: 我还能再次拥有爱一个人的能力吗？

lyrics.text: Who will walk with me in the rain?
lyrics.translation: 谁还会再陪我在雨中漫步？

lyrics.text: Please remember our summers
lyrics.translation: 请你，一定要记得我们一起度过的那些夏天

lyrics.text: Come the sun,
lyrics.translation: 在阳光下

lyrics.text: come the rain
lyrics.translation: 在雨中

lyrics.text: and the leaves falling
lyrics.translation: 在落叶纷飞里

lyrics.text: I will wait even if the seasons change
lyrics.translation: 四季交替，我会一直在这里等你

lyrics.text: Anxiety runs through my veins
lyrics.translation: 悲伤与焦虑顺着血管在我身体里蔓延

lyrics.text: I’ll escape from all these chains
lyrics.translation: 我终有一天能挣脱这些痛苦的枷锁

lyrics.text: Say “come back”, in all the possible ways
lyrics.translation: 说“回来吧”，用所有可能的方式

lyrics.text: I don’t want you to get lost
lyrics.translation: 我不想把你弄丢

lyrics.text: Will we ever meet again?
lyrics.translation: 我们还会再见面吗？

lyrics.text: I’ll anesthetize the pain
lyrics.translation: 我会麻醉疼痛自己疗伤

lyrics.text: Please remember our summers
lyrics.translation: 请你记住我们一起度过的那些夏天

lyrics.text: My heart is closed by duel
lyrics.translation: 我的心门被紧紧关闭了

lyrics.text: Will I learn to love again?
lyrics.translation: 我还能再次拥有爱一个人的能力吗？

lyrics.text: Who will walk with me in the rain?
lyrics.translation: 谁还会再陪我在雨中漫步？

lyrics.text: Please remember our summers
lyrics.translation: 请你一定要记得我们一起度过的那些夏天
